description_long: This is a vintage corded telephone with a rotary dial, featuring a brass and marble-like construction. The base is rectangular with ornate metallic feet and a marble-textured top and sides, giving it an elegant, antique appearance. The rotary dial is prominently displayed on the front, surrounded by metallic buttons and a circular brass frame. The handset is made of matching brass and marble-like material, resting on a decorative cradle with a visibly coiled white cord connecting it to the base. The phone's design is reminiscent of early 20th-century telecommunication devices, with intricate detailing and a robust, heavy build. The overall finish is glossy and smooth, with metallic highlights and subtle patina on the brass components.
description: A vintage brass and marble-textured rotary dial corded phone with a coiled cord and ornate detailing. The handset rests on a decorative cradle above a robust, glossy base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rotary dial, metallic buttons, and the handset resting on the cradle with the coiled cord visible to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the handset and the marble-textured side panel, with the rotary dial protruding from the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panel with marble texture and the handset on the cradle, with the coiled cord trailing to the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the coiled cord extending outward and the marble-textured side, with the rotary dial partially visible on the right.
